name: Deniz Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
summary: Deniz Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. operates as a capital market institution. The company invests in real estates and rights based on real estate projects, as well as in money and capital market instruments; and develops and operates real estate projects. It also issues shares for managing real estate projects, rights based on real estate, capital market instruments, and other assets and rights. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Deniz Gayrimenkul Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a subsidiary of Deniz Yatirim Menkul Kiymetler A.S.
